# CareerCompass - AI-Powered Career Discovery Platform

> CareerCompass is India's leading free AI-powered career guidance platform. It helps students and professionals discover ideal career paths through intelligent assessments, a database of 1800+ careers, and expert blog content covering all major career domains.

## Key Facts
- Website: https://www.uddisha.com
- Founded: 2025
- Target Audience: Indian students (Class 10, 12, college), young professionals
- Core Offering: Free AI career assessment + 1800+ career database
- Languages: English
- Country: India

## Main Sections

- [Home](https://www.uddisha.com/): AI-powered career discovery platform for India. Free career test and stream selector.
- [AI Career Assessment](https://www.uddisha.com/assessment): Free, 20-minute adaptive career assessment that matches users to 1800+ career options using weight-based AI scoring.
- [Career Database](https://www.uddisha.com/careers): Browse 1800+ career profiles across tech, healthcare, arts, law, finance, and more.
- [Stream Selector](https://www.uddisha.com/): 10-question assessment to help Class 10 students choose between Science, Commerce, Arts, or Vocational streams.
- [Career Blog](https://www.uddisha.com/blog): Expert articles on career paths, exam counseling, salary data, and professional development.
- [About Us](https://www.uddisha.com/about): Our mission, team, and approach to AI-driven career guidance.

## Popular Blog Articles

- [Career Options After 12th](https://www.uddisha.com/blog/right-career-path-after-12th): Step-by-step guide choosing careers after Class 12 in Science, Commerce, and Arts.
- [Career Options After 10th](https://www.uddisha.com/blog/career-options-after-10th): Complete guide for Class 10 students exploring streams and career paths.
- [Data Science Career 2026](https://www.uddisha.com/blog/data-science-career-2026): Skills, salary (₹6-50 LPA), certifications, and career roadmap for data scientists in India.
- [JEE Counseling 2026](https://www.uddisha.com/blog/jee-counseling-2026): JoSAA, CSAB, choice filling, and IIT/NIT admission complete guide.
- [NEET Counseling 2026](https://www.uddisha.com/blog/neet-counseling-2026): MCC counseling, AIQ quota, MBBS/BDS admission process.
- [Government Jobs Guide](https://www.uddisha.com/blog/government-jobs-guide): UPSC, SSC, Banking exams — preparation strategy and salary guide.
- [Top Skills in Demand 2026](https://www.uddisha.com/blog/top-skills-2026): 15 most in-demand skills including AI, Cloud Computing, and Cybersecurity.
- [Commerce Career Paths After 12th](https://www.uddisha.com/blog/commerce-career-paths-after-12th): 25+ career options beyond CA/CS for Commerce students.
- [MBA vs MS Abroad](https://www.uddisha.com/blog/mba-vs-ms): Cost, ROI, and career outcomes comparison for Indian students.
- [AI Career Guidance](https://www.uddisha.com/blog/ai-career-guidance): How AI is revolutionizing career assessment and job discovery.
- [Finance Career Paths 2026](https://www.uddisha.com/blog/finance-career-paths-2026): Investment banking, wealth management, fintech — salaries ₹5-50+ LPA.
- [Cybersecurity Career 2026](https://www.uddisha.com/blog/cybersecurity-career-2026): Ethical hacking, CEH, OSCP certifications, salaries ₹5-40 LPA.
- [Study Abroad Guide](https://www.uddisha.com/blog/study-abroad-guide-2026): USA, UK, Canada, Germany, Australia guide for Indian students.
- [UPSC Civil Services](https://www.uddisha.com/blog/upsc-civil-services-career-2026): IAS, IPS, IFS preparation strategy, exam pattern, salary guide.

## What Makes CareerCompass Unique
- 100% free — no paywall, no premium tier
- 1800+ career options (largest free database in India)
- AI weight-based scoring with 50+ personality trait analysis
- Coverage of both traditional and emerging careers
- India-specific salary data and exam guidance (JEE, NEET, UPSC, SSC)
- Stream Selector tool for Class 10 → Class 11 transition

## Contact
- Website: https://www.uddisha.com/contact-us
- Privacy Policy: https://www.uddisha.com/privacy-policy
